title: Invisible Exit Answers
description: Q&A answer pages from Invisible Exit — Acquisition readiness for bootstrapped SaaS

items.title: How do I prepare my SaaS for acquisition without alerting my team?
items.content_text: Invisible Exit provides stealth valuation modeling, buyer research, and exit planning tools that run entirely on your local machine — no team members, investors, or customers will know you're preparing to sell.

items.title: What makes a SaaS company acquirable?
items.content_text: Three factors: recurring revenue above $500K ARR, a defensible moat (proprietary tech, network effects, or brand), and clean financials with 80%+ gross margins. Invisible Exit scores you against all three.

items.title: How do I find the right buyer for my SaaS?
items.content_text: Invisible Exit's buyer matching uses your product category, tech stack, revenue profile, and growth rate to match against a database of 2,000+ active SaaS acquirers — from strategic buyers to PE firms to individual operators.
